nodes.label: AI as tool for interpreting regulations and legal text
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole authoritative source without verification
nodes.grounding_span: I will use AI as a starting place, then compare the answer I receive with a search engine as well as internal documents

nodes.label: AI for client communication
nodes.label_negative: Using technical jargon directly with clients
nodes.grounding_span: I will ask AI how I can explain to the client, in regular terms, what I need

nodes.label: AI as search term generator for rare problems
nodes.grounding_span: By using AI, i was able to find key words that aide in my search through my internal documents

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.grounding_span: as AI becomes more reliable and updates more frequently, we will be allowed to trust AI to provide answers

nodes.label: AI use for internal company guidelines
nodes.grounding_span: Items that are set by my company, rather than government or external laws or regulations, are easier to complete myself

nodes.label: Accuracy and compliance in mortgage processing
nodes.grounding_span: confirm current regulations within my industry

nodes.label: Client success and satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: so that my clients can understand, in laymen's terms, what items are required

nodes.label: Efficiency in problem-solving
nodes.grounding_span: made confirming that answer much easier with my internal documents, instead of feeling like I am 'flying blind'

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: I will use AI as a starting place, then compare the answer I receive with a search engine as well as internal documents

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: When I come across a discrepancy, I will go back to AI to question why a google search may be providing me different information

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I absolutely think AI will start to play a more prominent role

nodes.label: Systematic cross-referencing — uses AI as starting point then verifies with multiple sources
nodes.grounding_span: I will use AI as a starting place, then compare the answer I receive with a search engine as well as internal documents

nodes.label: Iterative discrepancy resolution — circles back to AI when finding inconsistencies
nodes.grounding_span: When I come across a discrepancy, I will go back to AI to question why a google search may be providing me different information
